rows.label: tev060101_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Kupi about the caravan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Kupi if anything is troubling her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0001
rows.name: Welcome, traveler![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0002
rows.name:
This is Dopang Caravan, warm
and caring home of Nopon who
prefer quiet, peaceful life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0003
rows.name:
Friend should rest now after
long journey. Caravan can be
like second home to friend![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0004
rows.name:
...Oh, and if friend has any questions
or problems, just ask Kupi.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0005
rows.name:
Kupi take job as leader seriously and
want friend to feel taken care of.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0008
rows.name:
Hmm... Kupi does have troubles, but
Kupi should try to figure out
solution alone first. ...Hrrrrrrg![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0009
rows.name:
...H-hrr-hrrrRRRRG! *gasp* *wheeze*
*pant* Mo-mo. Maybe Kupi thinking too
hard. Brain about to have meltdown![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0010
rows.name:
Maybe Kupi should just go ahead and
ask friend for help instead...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Kupi about White Woods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Kupi about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_SEL1031
rows.name: Ask Kupi about the humans who have come to White Woods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_SEL1041
rows.name: Ask Kupi about the humans who have come to White Woods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0011
rows.name:
Friend sees big round
thing floating up there?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0012
rows.name:
That is mystic place called
noctilucent sphere![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0013
rows.name:
Very shiny and sparkling inside, although
friend might not be able to get there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0014
rows.name:
No roads lead to it, so friend will
just have to learn how to fly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0015
rows.name:
Too bad friend does not have wings
like Kupi! Then friend could
flappity-flap right up there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0018
rows.name:
For some reason, Mira attracting
awful lot of aliens lately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0019
rows.name:
There are human friends, Growth,
and Mysteroids. ...Er, Kupi
probably forgetting some others.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0020
rows.name:
There might even be secret aliens Kupi
not meet yet! Friend never knows.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0021
rows.name:
Anyway, so long as aliens here,
Kupi hope they enjoy time on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0022
rows.name:
Kupi make sure all aliens
treated right and get help
they need at Dopang Caravan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0030
rows.name:
Kupi recently see lots of human friends
congregating near Shivering Sands.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0032
rows.name:
Kupi warn friends that
vicious Bias patrol area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0033
rows.name:
White Woods is very beautiful,
but also full of danger.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0034
rows.name:
Worst when haze sets in and
friends cannot see where they
are going. So be careful![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0039
rows.name:
Kupi heard sad news about human friends
congregating near Shivering Sands.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0040
rows.name: Apparently Bias did them all in. So sad![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0041
rows.name:
Also, human friends got turned into weapons!
Bias really are stupid jerkfaces...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0042
rows.name:
Bias probably turn Nopon they catch
into cushions and sit on them until
stuffing is squished out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0043
rows.name: See big round thing floating up there?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0044
rows.name:
That is mystic place called noctilucent
sphere. Kupi love it there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0045
rows.name:
Kupi had not been for while, but
other day decided to pop in and
have little bit of chill time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0046
rows.name:
Bad idea! Monster called Pharsis, the Everqueen
move in and strut around like she own place!
Kupi not get any chill time at all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG0047
rows.name:
If Everqueen was even just a little
bit adorable, Kupi might have tried
to make friends. But nope![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Kupi about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG2001
rows.name:
Lots of Nopon say such bad things
about Elder Nan. How elder is spoiled...
Or coward... Or total pervert...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG2002
rows.name:
But Kupi know elder is
thinking about Nopon future![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG2003
rows.name:
Elder only tell Nopon to move
to NLA to protect them from
mean and dangerous Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev060101_MSG2004
rows.name:
But Kupi has to stay with caravan great
Dopang passed down to her instead of
heading into city, which is kind of scary.[ST:wait ]
